name: lutrin-vscode
description: Live preview, diagnostics and PowerPoint export for Markdown presentations compiled by Lutrin.

lutrin.files.description: Glob of the Markdown files automatically treated as presentations (diagnostics without opening the preview). A "deck: true" frontmatter, or opening the preview by hand, has the same effect.

lutrin.debounceMs.description: Delay (ms) between a keystroke and recompiling the preview.

lutrin.defaultKit.markdownDescription: This editor's default kit for decks that name none (the name of a kit installed in `~/.config/lutrin/kits/`, the path of a kit directory, the path of a `.json` file, or `none` for the generic theme). Empty = the kit embedded in the extension, if there is one. The document always wins: the frontmatter `kit:`, the project default (`package.json`) and the user default (`lutrin config`, shared across tools) all take precedence over this setting.

lutrin.updateUrl.description: https URL of the internal update manifest (latest.json, generated by "npm run vsix" — http URLs are refused, and the manifest's sha256 digest is verified before installation). Empty = checking disabled. The extension checks on activation, then once a day, and through the "Check for Updates" command.

author: Julien Riel
